title: TechnoTales
body:
# 🔮 TechnoTales ⚙️

![1](https://i.imgur.com/U2IXh5p.png)

**This is an optimized TechnoMagic build with an incredibly beautiful world.**
In our modpack you will be met with a bunch of technological and magical mods that will not let you get bored!

![3](https://i.imgur.com/XPdGnKM.png)
**Main mods in modpack**
- All the time of the game you will be accompanied by incredibly beautiful worlds of Overworld, Nether and End! 
- Lots of mobs, varieties of creepers, endermen and common animals, seasons, weather, spells, mechanisms - everything that awaits you in technotales!

![2](https://i.imgur.com/VOCknpr.png)
